rows.label: tlk70000011_05_msg0001
rows.name:
I've decided to evacuate to
the shelter with my nan.

rows.label: tlk70000011_05_msg0002
rows.name:
I may have to let the shop go,
but Nan said I matter more to
her, so I could decide.

rows.label: tlk70000011_05_msg0003
rows.name:
So... Do you want to buy
any of my leftover stock?
